item.title: Set of 2 Zenyum Sonic Go Travel Sized Electric Toothbrush - Black/ White (Portable, IPX7 Waterproof)

attributes.name: Feature
attributes.value: Clean Mode, Gentle Mode, White Mode

paragraph_list.text: 𝐈𝐧𝐜𝐥𝐮𝐝𝐞𝐬: 2x ZenyumSonic Go (Black/White)
*Travel Case is not included and has to be purchased separately*
Say hello to the new travel version of our best-selling Zenyum Sonic Electric Toothbrush – Zenyum SonicGo!
➩ 𝐁𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐟𝐢𝐭𝐬:
•  High-frequency micro-vibrations ➜ Deep cleanse powered by sonic technology, providing you with an optimal dental care experience.
•  3 personalized settings ➜ You will always be able to find the perfect mode for you.
•  2-minute built-in timer ➜ Cultivate good brushing habits.
➩ 𝐅𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐬:
•  Slim & lightweight ➜ Easily bring ZenyumSonic Go with you on the move!
•  Incredible battery life ➜ Lasts up to 25 days on a single charge!
•  IPX7 waterproof ➜ Use your ZenyumSonic Go with peace of mind, whether you’re at the beach or in the shower.
➩ 𝐇𝐨𝐰-𝐭𝐨-𝐮𝐬𝐞:
•  Squeeze a pea-sized amount of toothpaste (use our ZenyumFresh day! or night. for best results) onto your ZenyumSonic Go. Remember to place the toothbrush in your mouth before you turn it on.
•  Press the power button to switch on the toothbrush. Press repeatedly to toggle modes and find the best one for you!
•  Glide your ZenyumSonic Go over your teeth. Change sides every 30 seconds. ZenyumSonic Go will beep every 30 seconds, so there’s no need to keep track.
•  Tada! Say hello to a supercharged smile. After 2 minutes in any mode, the ZenyumSonic Go will automatically switch off.
•  Rinse your mouth after to remove any residual toothpaste.
➩ 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐠𝐢𝐧𝐠:
• Please ensure the toothbrush handle is dry before charging. Avoid using fast charging or USB-C to USB-C cables when charging your toothbrush.
➩ 𝐂𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐫 𝐒𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞:
•  Issues or concerns? Contact us through chat and click on Chat with Seller

item.description:
𝐈𝐧𝐜𝐥𝐮𝐝𝐞𝐬: 2x ZenyumSonic Go (Black/White)

*Travel Case is not included and has to be purchased separately* 

Say hello to the new travel version of our best-selling Zenyum Sonic Electric Toothbrush – Zenyum SonicGo! 

➩ 𝐁𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐟𝐢𝐭𝐬:
•  High-frequency micro-vibrations ➜ Deep cleanse powered by sonic technology, providing you with an optimal dental care experience.
•  3 personalized settings ➜ You will always be able to find the perfect mode for you.
•  2-minute built-in timer ➜ Cultivate good brushing habits.

➩ 𝐅𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐬:
•  Slim & lightweight ➜ Easily bring ZenyumSonic Go with you on the move!
•  Incredible battery life ➜ Lasts up to 25 days on a single charge!
•  IPX7 waterproof ➜ Use your ZenyumSonic Go with peace of mind, whether you’re at the beach or in the shower.

➩ 𝐇𝐨𝐰-𝐭𝐨-𝐮𝐬𝐞:
•  Squeeze a pea-sized amount of toothpaste (use our ZenyumFresh day! or night. for best results) onto your ZenyumSonic Go. Remember to place the toothbrush in your mouth before you turn it on.
•  Press the power button to switch on the toothbrush. Press repeatedly to toggle modes and find the best one for you!
•  Glide your ZenyumSonic Go over your teeth. Change sides every 30 seconds. ZenyumSonic Go will beep every 30 seconds, so there’s no need to keep track.
•  Tada! Say hello to a supercharged smile. After 2 minutes in any mode, the ZenyumSonic Go will automatically switch off.
•  Rinse your mouth after to remove any residual toothpaste.

➩ 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐠𝐢𝐧𝐠:
• Please ensure the toothbrush handle is dry before charging. Avoid using fast charging or USB-C to USB-C cables when charging your toothbrush.

➩ 𝐂𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐫 𝐒𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞:
•  Issues or concerns? Contact us through chat and click on Chat with Seller

services.title: 100% Authentic
services.description: Shopee Mall products are guaranteed 100% authentic, and are sourced directly from brands and authorised distributors. If you receive an inauthentic product, you may request for a 2x refund.

services.title: 15-Day Free Returns
services.description: Free returns can be requested within 15 days from the date of delivery. To qualify for change of mind returns, items must be in original condition, with packaging and labels intact (including free gifts) and safety seals unbroken. Applicable to selected items. T&Cs apply.
